summary: Good‑sounding mid‑80s recording highlighted by a killer Wish I Was a Headlight within an enjoyable China>Rider transition jam.
review: The reviewer raves about the China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider segue and especially the "Wish I Was a Headlight" moment, calling it possibly one of the all‑time best. No complaints about the audio are mentioned, implying a listenable source, while the performance is praised for its crunchy 1985 vibe.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review emphasizes strong musical moments; no recording‑quality details are given, limiting confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on sound clarity, mix balance, or source type.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Transition from China>Rider is noted as solid, and the Wish I Was a Headlight segment is highlighted as a peak moment.
